title: Xtra Tender Ukrainian Broad Beans Pilaf
description: This briny, tender, and indulgent Ukrainian dish features broad beans, flambe, and is pescatarian-friendly, making it a great option for a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the broad beans, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the uncooked white rice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the water, white wine, and lemon juice, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Flambe the pilaf by adding a small amount of vodka or other high-proof liquor and igniting it.
Serve the pilaf hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
